---
name: Cultural Analytics Talk and Discussion
about: Checklist for organizing a new event in the series.
title: 'Cultural Analytics Talk and Discussion series: [Speaker Name] - [Event Date]'
labels: 'event-planning'
assignees: ''
---
The Cultural Analytics Group, led by TT, invites guests to campus to lead a talk at the I School and a discussion at AI Futures Lab. Following is a list of standard tasks that should be edited to reflect the needs of the specific event/invited guest.


## Resources
[Main spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/13cYgJOi4tL7iq04LxK_xxc8VAC3ikgQW4RM1NegWLjM/edit?gid=1083396824#gid=1083396824)
[Email drafts](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?usp=sharing)

## Speaker Information
- Speaker Name and Email:
- Event Date:
- Event Time:

---

## Reservations
- [ ] Reserve Room 210, South Hall
- [ ] Request lunch order for South Hall
- [ ] Reserve Seminar Room at AI Futures Lab
- [ ] Reserve room for guest speaker at Hotel Shattuck

## Invitations
- [ ] Invite TT, KW, event staff to bCal events
- [ ] Invite event staff to [setup] bCal events
- [ ] Draft formal invitation ([template](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1SohZJLIGqpRLZC6-_3tFpZ3rcCSR32Pxo0I9eSGGJMc&usp=drive_copy))
- [ ] Create PDF version of the invitation
- [ ] [Share email draft](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.9343ntqfgeqd) & PDF with Tim for review
- [ ] Send formal invitation (with PDF attached) to speaker
- [ ] Send travel email ([Choose one](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.al7juetvmell): “air travel - hotel” OR “local travel - hotel”)
- [ ] Complete speaker vendor registration (preferably completed before travel)
- [ ] Send [Speaker Release Request](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.mqwj6zqxnccd) (Once title/abstract are received)

## Coordination
- [ ] Make a copy of the [Application Form](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1cyG0Ufe8kQmA7zkIEJKQ0yJcQfET94VdzGo163rOx6o&usp=drive_copy) and update for this event
- [ ] Send title/abstract to Jonathan (Web) to add Zoom to the event
- [ ] Send copy of the Application Form to Jonathan (Web)
- [ ] File signed speaker request on Drive (will need to provide it to I School for video release)
- [ ] Send registration update to [Admin Name TBD] (Determine if >40 lunches needed)
- [ ] Get speaker details and expense list from TT, and add the expenses that will be covered to this issue
standard: Lodging (Hotel Shattuck, 2 nts), Airfare, Ground Transportation, No meal reimbursements (lunch and dinner typically provided)

## Promotion
- [ ] Request images from Emily (Social Media); Cc Caitlin (Comms)
- [ ] Send event announcements (Talk and Discussion)
- [ ] Add event to the newsletter
- [ ] [Invite](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.w39em8gla8ve) Tim’s identified list to the discussion (No application required)
- [ ] Add invited guests to bCal

## Registrations
- [ ] Check registration list on I School event page (1 week before event)
- [ ] Update [attendee tracking spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dKFwWvwBLj3xNM7GMLjV1Z0SPOgpWuMzjxmnBq1Q1MU/edit?usp=sharing) with I School registration list
- [ ] Check Application Form responses and link to [attendee tracking spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dKFwWvwBLj3xNM7GMLjV1Z0SPOgpWuMzjxmnBq1Q1MU/edit?usp=sharing) (1 week before event)
- [ ] Ask Kirstie to review borderline applications
- [ ] Send [acceptance emails](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.irvnlfmh7u5v) to applicants
- [ ] Add accepted applicants to bCal

## Day of Event
- [ ] Purchase food for AI Futures Lab discussion
- [ ] Set up food
- [ ] Lobby duty: Let people in 15 mins prior to start
- [ ] At I School and AIFL events, check people of and add walk-ins to [attendee tracking spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dKFwWvwBLj3xNM7GMLjV1Z0SPOgpWuMzjxmnBq1Q1MU/edit?usp=sharing)
- [ ] Set out name tags and crowd release sign - make clear notes for anyone who does not want to be captured in the photos
- [ ] Take photos
- [ ] Clean up after the discussion event

## Post-Event 
- [ ] Send speaker [Post Event - Payment](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1olB38PY9gWuqXn0vEUXU8aKkYtuOyZmG5mZmvu896qs/edit?pli=1&tab=t.v1iqdrvsd6ej) thank you and instructions
- [ ] Upload photos to Drive
- [ ] Submit details to Jonathan (Web) so that I School can release the recording
- [ ] Write blog post
- [ ] Send blog post to speaker for review
- [ ] Reminder: Send reimbursement reminder 28 days after trip concludes
